title: pavetta mollis
intro: Pavetta mollis, also known as the red gold or African red gold, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavetta mollis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Pavetta mollis is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
